page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd is a memory-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 90 dedicated vCPUs derived from 45 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 720 GB of RAM, providing a resource density of 8.0 GB per core. Storage is bundled directly with the instance, consisting of eight local NVMe SSDs totaling 3216 GB of high-speed local capacity. There are no GPUs included on this instance type.

Performance benchmarks indicate top-tier multi-core capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core CPU execution, PassMark CPU scores, and Clang software compilation ranking in the top 10% of tested systems. The AMD EPYC processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512, AVX512_VNNI, and AVX512_BF16, which contribute to its top-tier performance in cryptographic operations and prompt processing for smaller language models. Memory bandwidth is strong, particularly for cached read operations, though large-block write bandwidth falls into the average tier. Database operations and Redis SET throughput are highly competitive, with Redis operations reaching top-tier performance levels.

Given its high resource density, the c3d-highmem-90-lssd offers strong qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require simultaneous access to massive memory pools and fast local scratch space. The inclusion of bundled NVMe storage reduces the need for external block storage attachments for high-throughput tasks, though the lack of GPU acceleration limits its utility for heavy deep learning training. This server is highly suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores like Redis, high-throughput software compilation, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd is a memory-optimized server configured with 90 dedicated vCPUs and 720 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 processor on the x86_64 architecture. It features eight bundled local NVMe SSDs providing 3216 GB of high-speed storage, with no GPU accelerators. The hardware delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance, software compilation speeds, and cryptographic execution, alongside strong memory read bandwidth. Database operations and Redis throughput also rank highly, making this instance highly efficient for data-intensive applications. While large-block write bandwidth and single-core performance are average, the high memory-to-core ratio and integrated NVMe storage offer excellent qualitative value for resource-dense deployments. It is highly suited for in-memory databases, large-scale data processing, software build pipelines, and medium-scale language model inference.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd is a memory-optimized server with 90 vCPUs, 720 GB RAM, and 3216 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier multi-core CPU and database performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-90-lssd features 90 vCPUs, 720 GB RAM, and 3216 GB NVMe SSD storage for memory-intensive database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 platform featuring ninety dedicated vCPUs, massive RAM capacity, and integrated high-speed local NVMe SSD storage.
bullet_points: 90 dedicated vCPUs and 720 GB RAM powered by AMD EPYC 9B14
Bundled 3216 GB local storage across eight NVMe SSDs
Top-tier multi-core CPU, cryptographic, and software compilation performance
Excellent throughput for Redis and high-speed database operations
Best suited for in-memory databases, ETL pipelines, and LLM inference
